executives.name: John Fitzgerald
executives.background: Mr Fitzgerald has over 30 years’ experience in the resources sector. He has held senior positions at NM Rothschild & Sons, Investec Bank, and Commonwealth Bank. He is a Director of Turaco Gold and was previously Chairman of Exore Resources.
